data.current_description: Export a saved report in the specified format. Identical to the Export initiated from the web interface.
data.description_suggestion: Exports a saved report in the specified format (HTML, PDF, CSV, Excel, JSON, or PNG). Accepts format and optional filtering/customization parameters via query string. Returns the report data in the requested format. Equivalent to the Export function in the web interface. Requires JWT authentication.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks critical details about supported formats, parameter handling, return format specifics, and authentication requirements. AI agents need to understand what formats are available, how to specify them, and what to expect in the response.

message: Operation 'exportReportPost' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.current_description: Same as GET but allows passing parameters in the request body.
data.description_suggestion: Exports a saved report in the specified format by accepting parameters in the request body instead of query string. Supports the same formats as the GET endpoint (HTML, PDF, CSV, Excel, JSON, PNG) and allows complex filtering/customization parameters. Returns the report data in the requested format. Requires JWT authentication. Use this endpoint when parameters are complex or exceed URL length limits.
